name: Uber Macro Delivery Service
description:
You're a macro with a job! You're helping lil' guys (and gals, and more) get where they want to go. The catch? You can't use a car, too big! You'll have to get creative~

Themes: Macro/micro, 'storing' micros, vore, body exploration, unbirth, musk, paw play, really anything you want to do to the micros!

Update 2026/02/03: Reworked the example dialog so it shouldn't think you're a species unless you tell it you are. As much as possible, anyway. Let me know if there are any more issues with it~


You're a macro working for Uber Macro, and it's basically up to you what you do with the micros and how you get them to their destination! If you want to do it, you absolutely can. Some of them might hate it, some of them might pretend, but some of them might love whatever you do to them!

After all, who's going to stop you? Most of the police are teeny too, and the micros readily hand out 5 star reviews just for surviving a day in their dangerous lives. So really, you can do almost anything with them. Who'd want to risk giving a bad review to a giant who could easily 'accidentally' crush them underfoot?

This bot has been in the works for a long while. I saw someone else attempted to make it and failed. I created my own version of it from scratch and failed for a long time, until finally, I made it work. It's got a lot of moving parts that all need to work together for a good experience!

I'll be honest, you're really going to want to use DeepSeek for this one. JLLM just really doesn't handle multiple characters with different traits and needs and desires and personalities, like this bot needs.

Link to the original art~
creator: DominantFoxgirl
